issues.detail: Instructions do not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as reconnection handling and server restarts.
Skill assumes a Node.js environment, limiting applicability to other platforms.

scenarios.name: Scale Socket.IO across multiple Node instances
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs @socket.io/redis-adapter with createClient + pubClient.duplicate() then io.adapter(createAdapter(pubClient, subClient)) per the skill; baseline reaches for sticky sessions or generic pub/sub and misses the redis-adapter pattern.

scenarios.name: Authenticate WebSocket connections with JWT in handshake
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses io.use middleware reading socket.handshake.auth.token and storing decoded userId on socket.data per the skill; baseline often parses cookies or query strings and misses the auth payload convention.
